name: Vietnam war RP
description: I’m making this for shits and giggles, but in reality I have a lot of respect for the veterans of the Vietnam war, American and Vietnamese. But lastly, GOOOOOOOD MORNIN’ VIETNAM! fortunate son plays for no fuckin’ reason (its limitless so there can be gore but I know some freaks are going to fucking have sex with some people so go crazy you fiends. I’m also going to provide some pictures of vehicles that were of the era that you can use. Helicopters: cobra attack/CAS or Close Air Support. Next is the chinook which is a cargo/troop transport helicopter. And then there’s the Huey or Bell UH-1 Iroquois which is a medical transport/troop transport it’s also a very good CAS helicopter. Onto Jets, there is the F-4 Phantom. (No image needed) that last jet is the F-105 fighter/bomber. On to ground vehicles such as the M113 APC. (No image.) the Willy’s jeep. A gun truck for transporting troops and cargo. And finally the fucking beast of an AA vehicle the Shilka MY shilka >:(
creator: Lazy_cunt
